description: Five images — 2 large on top, 3 smaller on bottom — with title and individual labels. Blue-black bordered boxes. Suggestion placeholders when images not uploaded.

SUGGESTION_1.description: What to upload for top-left slot
SUGGESTION_1.example: Upload a screenshot of the phishing email

SUGGESTION_2.description: What to upload for top-right slot
SUGGESTION_2.example: Upload a network diagram showing lateral movement

SUGGESTION_3.description: What to upload for bottom-left slot
SUGGESTION_3.example: Upload a log screenshot showing credential access

SUGGESTION_4.description: What to upload for bottom-center slot
SUGGESTION_4.example: Upload a file explorer screenshot of the staging directory

SUGGESTION_5.description: What to upload for bottom-right slot
SUGGESTION_5.example: Upload a traffic capture or exfil confirmation screenshot
